_readme: Tune each object's scroll pass here, then rebuild (npm run build) or just save while `npm run dev` is running.
ANGLES ARE IN DEGREES. Positions are screen NDC: x -1 = left edge, +1 = right edge; y -1 = bottom, +1 = top.
Each object flies in at 'entry', parks beside the title at 'mid' (this is what shows when the section is centered), then leaves at 'exit'.
fit    = on-screen size (bigger number = bigger object).
depth  = metres in front of the camera (bigger = pushed further back / smaller).
face   = [pitch, yaw, bank] tilt in degrees. pitch nods the nose up/down, yaw turns it left/right, bank rolls it.
roll   = extra spin in the screen plane in degrees (use +/-180 for a clean flip, +/-90 to turn a silhouette on its side). Keeps the same faces toward the camera.
phase  = shifts the whole pass earlier(+) or later(-) in the scroll so the park lines up with the section's visual center. Small values, e.g. 0.1.
Set 'manhole': true instead of 'model' for the procedural manhole cover. The 'hero' entry has no object on purpose.
